_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to participate in fitness activities and investigate how regular physical activity affects our health and fitness over time.

_source.w: We are learning to participate in fitness activities and investigate how regular physical activity affects our health and fitness over time.
y: Understanding the link between regular activity and fitness empowers us to take charge of our health.
Investigation — not just participation — builds evidence-based understanding of fitness.
These insights help us make informed decisions about our physical activity habits.
eg: Participating in a fitness program and tracking our progress over several weeks.
Investigating how cardiovascular, strength, and flexibility training each affect the body differently.
Comparing fitness data before and after a period of regular training.
Discussing the mental health benefits — reduced anxiety, improved mood — of regular exercise.
Analysing how different types of activity contribute to different components of fitness.
Designing a fitness investigation with pre- and post-testing.
